content: Self-Refine's iterative unsupervised refinement framework can be extended to ground multi-perspective LLM self-reflection mechanisms, turning inconsistent perspective feedback from methods like Self-Contrast into a continuous self-improvement loop rather than a one-shot correction step. This creates a hybrid system that retains Self-Refine's advantage of no extra training or supervision while leveraging the diversity of conflicting perspectives to escape local optima in output quality.
